purpose: Source registry for the Chile riverbed-aggregate extraction pilot. Verify terms and availability before each production use.

sources.name: SNIFA — Superintendencia del Medio Ambiente
sources.use: Public cases, fiscalisation context and source links
sources.label_policy: Use confirmed labels only when the public record clearly establishes the activity and location.

sources.name: SEIA — Servicio de Evaluación Ambiental
sources.label_policy: Record permit validity separately; a project record alone is not proof of a permit active on a specific date.

sources.name: Portal de Transparencia del Estado
sources.use: Structured requests for permit, inspection and resolution lists
sources.label_policy: Keep the received authority, response date and original file with every imported record.

sources.name: Earth Search STAC
sources.label_policy: Preserve scene ID, acquisition datetime and asset URL with the derived image patch.
